event.name: UEFA Champions League Final 2023 — Manchester City vs Inter Milan

context.pre_match_notes: Man City chasing the treble — Premier League and FA Cup already won. Guardiola's fourth UCL final. Haaland 52 goals across all competitions in debut season. Inter reached final via Milan derby semi-final win, organised defensively, Tier 2 opponent commercially but dangerous tactically. Macro neutral. No injury concerns for City.

question: Predict the match direction (HOME/AWAY/DRAW) and identify the primary signal variable driving your prediction.

verified_outcome.key_variable: narrative_modifier — treble bid momentum, institutional belief at maximum
